---
title: '180 About Abortion Mindsets'
date: '2012-01-21T23:02:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '466404752157052225'
blogger_filename: '/2012/01/180-about-abortion-mindsets_21.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<br />Abortion and Nazi&nbsp;Genocide, the same?<br /><br />Watch this very powerful video!<br /><br /><iframe allowfullscreen="" frameborder="0" height="315" src="http://www.youtube.com/embed/7y2KsU_dhwI?rel=0" width="560"></iframe>
